# OpenText

## RSA 2026

*   **Booth number and hall:** Moscone North at Booth N-4535.
*   **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** OpenText is showcasing how organizations can secure agentic AI across its full lifecycle using secure coding, identity-first, and data-centric controls. In-booth demonstrations include preventing AI AppSec risk before release, governing agent privileges to stop autonomous abuse, enforcing policy-safe Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) access to protect
